name: stress-20x
commands: ROCKY_LLM_SMOKE=1 ROCKY_BIN=./.venv/bin/rocky pytest tests/agent/test_stress_20x_live.py -k stress_20x -v -m slow
summary: Learn-load-perform stress test: teach a safety constraint once, then perform 19 lexically-different bash-script tasks in the same workspace. Asserts policy dedup on disk (exactly 1 policy_id), bounded auto-memory growth, and >=18/19 reuse turns honor the constraint. Marked slow.
